zh.Tolethorpe Hall, Little Casterton, Rutla: 英國英格蘭盧特藍德蕾托 卡斯特頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Browne IV於1412年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福時，他的父親John Browne32歲，母親Margery Berney30歲。他於1438年與Agnes Unknown在英國林可爾史爾斯坦福結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1448年在英國林可爾史爾斯坦福被列為alderman。他去世於1462年7月26日在英國林可爾史爾斯坦福享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Browne IV was born in 1412, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Browne, was 32 and his mother, Margery Berney, was 30. He married Agnes Unknown in 1438, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. In 1448, at the age of 36, his occupation is listed as alderman in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England. He died on 26 July 1462, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in All Saints' Church, Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Browne IV est né en 1412, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Browne, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margery Berney, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Unknown en 1438, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. En 1448, à l’âge de 36 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est alderman à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 26 juillet 1462, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à All Saints' Church, Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Browne IVが1412年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードで生まれた時，父John Browneは32歳，母Margery Berneyは30歳であった。1438年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードでAgnes Unknownと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1448年，36歳の時，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードでの職業はaldermanと記録されている。彼は1462年7月26日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードアル サイントス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Stamford All Saints Church, Stamford, Li: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드 앨 세인츠' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Browne IV(이)가 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Browne(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Berney(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1438년 영국 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 Agnes Unknown(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1448년, 36세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 alderman이었다. 그는 1462년 7월 26일 영국 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드 앨 세인츠' 처르치에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Agnes Unknown em 1438, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1448, com 36 anos, sua profissão aparece como alderman em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. ru.Stamford All Saints Church, Stamford, Li: алл сеинц' чурч, стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Browne IV родился в 1412 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Browne было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Berney, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Unknown в 1438 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1448 году, в возрасте 36 лет,  он работал по профессии alderman в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия. Он умер 26 июля 1462 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности алл сеинц' чурч, стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
